decisions.rationale: IR re-read confirms bTIXh parent_id is ai_RNbBHXRh while ai_RNbBHXRi is a sibling group under the same parent; the component nests bTIXh inside ai_RNbBHXRi alongside ai_RNbBHXRj. Valid hierarchy reorder, but DASH-04 AC-1 scopes required markers to ai_RNbBHXRZ, ai_RNbBHXRd, and ai_RNbBHXRg — not bTIXh nesting. ui_evidence for bTIXh, ai_RNbBHXRi, and ai_RNbBHXRj all pass; mood label and slider render in the correct visual stack per layout_notes. Intermediate-group flattening is parity-tooling polish with no downstream depends_on impact (DASH-05 needs card mount and submit API, not mood-group DOM order).

Valid ux note: ai_RNbBHXRd streak badge is conditionally hidden while loadingStreak or when streak is 0, whereas Bubble may reserve badge chrome at zero. DASH-04 ACs require the badge marker and streak refresh after submit (AC-1/AC-3), not a persistent zero-state shell. ui_evidence for ai_RNbBHXRd passes; FV-4 passes with daily_check_in_streak_number / streak_days_number fallback. Low-priority visual parity — defer optional zero/load badge shell to a later dashboard polish pass.

Valid functional gap in the dormant table-success branch: submitDailyCheckIn computes nextStreak from readCheckinsFromOnboarding even when tryInsertCheckinTable returns true, so consecutive-day streak would reset to 1 once dailycheckin rows exist. Code review confirms lines 186–190 always derive dates from onboarding_data before the inserted branch. However brownfield prototype has no dailycheckin table (FV-5 pass, coverage preflight gap-fill); the active path is profiles.onboarding_data fallback, which satisfies AC-3 and FV-3/FV-4 today. Querying dailycheckin dates on insert success is the correct fix but is untestable until schema is provisioned — bundle with C-4 migration wave rather than block advance on unreachable code.

Valid schema-dependency gap: dailycheckin and user tables are absent from supabase migrations; checkinApi best-effort insert then falls back to profiles.onboarding_data.daily_checkins with Bubble field keys. DASH-04 scope and AC-3 require Supabase client parity with Bubble bindings; coverage preflight documents the prototype-schema gap and reuse_decision gap-fill. Landing dailycheckin migration and table-path QA seed is deferred infrastructure work — mirrors DASH-03 C-2 pathenrollment1 deferral. DASH-05 depends_on DASH-04 for card mount and submit workflow, not provisioned table verification; no downstream gate blocked.

summary: 0 fix_now, 4 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, no blockers, all ACs and ui_evidence pass. Deferred: C-1 mood label bTIXh hierarchy reorder (optional ui-fidelity polish); C-2 zero/load streak badge shell (visual polish); C-3 table-insert streak computation fix bundled with C-4 dailycheckin migration and table-path QA in a later schema wave.
